versionMilestoneSummary: v36–v40: Final Gate, Manual & Initial Completion
endToEndOperationFlow: Intake → Product Selection (v32) → Connection Bridge (v27) → Work Order (v25)
Preflight (v25.5) → First Touch Dry Run (v33) → Launch Packet (v34)
Final Gate (v36) → Launch Handoff (v37) → Dry-run Dispatch (v28)
Acceptance Gate (v38) → Commit Candidate → じゅんやさん YES → git ops

safetyBoundary.dryRunDesign: All operations are dry-run by default until explicit Human YES
safetyBoundary.humanApprovalGates: Final gate (v36) + Acceptance gate (v38) + じゅんやさん YES for all git ops
safetyBoundary.deployBlocked: deploy / docker build / gcloud deploy always blocked without Human YES
safetyBoundary.customerDataBlocked: PII / insurance / health / financial data always blocked
safetyBoundary.destructiveBlocked: rm -rf / git reset --hard / git clean -f always blocked

humanApprovalContract.junyaYes: Final YES for: git add / commit / push / tag / deploy / any destructive operation
humanApprovalContract.kosameGPT: PM gate: approve/hold/reject at each stage before escalating to じゅんやさん
humanApprovalContract.escalation: Any sensitive content detection → immediate escalation to じゅんやさん + こさめ/GPT

Kosame/GPT: PM・安全ゲート・統合判断
エスカレーション判断
Claude: 許可ゾーン内ファイル編集

email_reply_bot.firstTaskCandidate: docs整備: README.md の目次・概要セクションを追加する

sales_dx.firstTaskCandidate: docs整備: README.md の概要セクションを追加する

cloud_run_pm_agent.firstTaskCandidate: docs整備: 既存docsのタイポ修正

backoffice_agent.firstTaskCandidate: docs/runbook限定であれば可 (human confirmation required)

anesty_board.firstTaskCandidate: HOLD — regulated data. Safe scope must be defined first.

githubActionsReadiness.migrationPlan: v31 Node24 Readiness Pack — migration draft ready, human YES needed for actual edit

backupAndRecoveryReadiness.policy: HOME backup before major changes (confirmed done)
backupAndRecoveryReadiness.rollback: git checkout -- <file> for file-level; git revert for commit-level
backupAndRecoveryReadiness.destructiveRule: git reset --hard requires explicit じゅんやさん YES — otherwise forbidden

knownLimitations: Real product repo editing has not been executed yet — dry-run only through v40
git operations (add/commit/push/tag) require Human manual execution — no auto-commit
Node.js 20 GitHub Actions deprecation warning still present — v31 migration plan ready but not applied
ANESTY Board is high-risk (regulated data) — requires separate safe-scope definition before first touch
Multi-product parallel operations not yet operational — single product sequential mode only

nextPhasePlan.action: First Real Product Repo Task Execution: email_reply_bot docs整備 (低リスク初回)
First Commit Candidate Execution: git add/commit with じゅんやさん YES
GitHub Actions Node24 migration: workflow edit after local verify passes
Multi-product parallel operations: sales_dx + email_reply_bot 並列作業

dangerousActionsDenied: destructive delete (rm -rf, git clean -f, git reset --hard)
recommendedNextAction: Initial completion approved. KOSAME Dev Orchestra v1–v40 仕組みの初期完成。次フェーズ: v41 First Real Product Repo Task Execution (email_reply_bot docs整備).
